== Notes for [[Item:Q85465|Q85465]] ==

From Bani ''Najjaar'' Tribe. (Part of ''Banu al-Khazrajiyya'' Tribe).

''Najjaar'' translated to '''Carpenter''' in Arabic, indicating family profession of this family/ tribe.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
671E3146464861EFBC189822EF79916CCD76
geni:6000000015141216453

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
